pageContext.name: Yor Forger
pageContext.description: From the hit anime series Spy x Family, the Yor Forger Action Figure joins S.H.Figuarts!  Spy x Family is the hijinks heart filled anime adventure follows infamous spy codenamed: Twilight with his hardest challenge to maintain world peace yet... He has to build a family?!  To execute this mission, he marries a beautiful woman who hides a dark secret, and adopts a young girl named Anya who is secretly a telepath.  The Yor Forger figure includes numerous options for capturing Yor's poses and personality as well as the weapons she uses as Thorn Princess. Add to your Spy x Family figure collection today!
